data.settleTest: Only the actual 2026 tender behavior settles this — whether EU data-center buyers in fact impose binding CRA/SBOM shortlist clauses before the Sept 2026 reporting date and Dec 2027 full conformity, and whether that pace pushes the entrant off enough shortlists to cut Year-1 share below 1%. The regulatory dates are known today, but whether buyers actually gate 2026 bids on CRA-readiness (versus accepting a compliance roadmap) is a demand-response that unfolds over the next 12-24 months.
